name: multi-tier-model-routing
description: Routes different agent pipeline steps to different model tiers based on task complexity to balance cost and quality. TRIGGER when: building an agent pipeline with multiple LLM call types (classification, decomposition, synthesis), optimizing LLM costs in a multi-step agent, choosing between reasoning models and chat models for different pipeline stages, adding fallback chains when a model tier fails mid-pipeline.
author: Assaf Elovic
